locations.name: Eastern State Penitentiary
locations.description: One of America's most historic and feared prisons. Solitary confinement cells echo with whispers.

locations.name: The Winchester Mystery House
locations.description: Built continuously for 38 years to confuse spirits. Doors to nowhere. Stairs to ceilings.

locations.name: Gettysburg Battlefield
locations.description: 51,000 casualties in three days. The dead have never stopped marching.

locations.name: Trans-Allegheny Lunatic Asylum
locations.description: Housed 2,400 patients in a space built for 250. The suffering soaked into the walls.

locations.name: Stanley Hotel
locations.description: Inspiration for The Shining. Room 217 never stays empty for long.

locations.name: Waverly Hills Sanatorium
locations.description: 63,000 deaths from tuberculosis. The body chute still carries echoes.

locations.name: Bachelor's Grove Cemetery
locations.description: Abandoned cemetery with over 100 documented paranormal incidents since 1960.

locations.name: Poveglia Island
locations.description: 160,000 plague victims buried here. The soil is half human ash. Access is forbidden.
